title: Social Media Impact
script:
Aditya: Hey everyone, welcome to the podcast!

Nisha: Aaj hum log social media ke baare mein baat karenge.

Kabir: Yeah, its impact on our lives, dekhenge.

Aditya: Dekho yaar, kya hum social media par bahut time spend karte hain?

Nisha: Haan, bilkul! Main toh subah uthte hi phone check karti hoon.

Kabir: Same here yaar. Entertainment toh milta hai, but kabhi kabhi distracting bhi hota hai, you know?

Aditya: Sahi hai, lekin social media ke benefits bhi toh hain na? We learn new things.

Nisha: Haan, acha! Main toh bahut educational pages follow karti hoon, skills improve karne ke liye.

Kabir: Woh toh hai, lekin problem hai overuse. Humko limits set karne chahiye.

Aditya: Kya hum study time ke doran phones use nahi karein?

Nisha: Haan, aur kya meals ke time bhi nahi?

Kabir: Laughs Wow, that's a good start! Sahi hai.

Aditya: Yeah, and theek hai, we can reduce screen time.

Nisha: Nahi toh, we are always stuck to the phone.

Kabir: Humko real life activities par bhi focus karna chahiye.

Aditya: Sochne wali baat hai, kya social media humare relationships ko bhi affect karta hai?

Nisha: Haan, kabhi kabhi hum real life conversations miss kar dete hain.

Kabir: Sahi kaha! Face-to-face interactions kam ho jaate hain.

Aditya: But yeah, it's also a way to stay connected with friends and family.

Nisha: Bilkul, especially jo door rehte hain unke saath.

Kabir: Acha, toh hum dono cheezon ka balance kaise create karein?

Aditya: Hum try karenge study time mein phone side rakhne ka.

Nisha: Haan, aur meals ke time par bhi nahi use karenge.

Kabir: Absolutely! Thank you everyone for listening.
